title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Costco India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Costco India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
